title: Web Developer -Remote
description:
**About The Company**
 Allied Container Group is a prominent logistics and supply chain management organization headquartered in Singapore, with a strong presence across the Asia\\-Pacific (APAC) and Europe, Middle East, and Africa (EMEA) regions. With nearly five decades of industry experience, the company specializes in delivering comprehensive logistics solutions tailored to meet the diverse needs of businesses of all sizes. Their service portfolio includes trucking, container haulage, depot yard operations, warehousing, distribution, and freight forwarding. The organization is committed to leveraging innovative technology to optimize operations, driven by a dedicated in\\-house tech team that harnesses artificial intelligence and advanced software development to enhance service delivery and operational efficiency.
   

  

**About The Role**
 The Web Developer will be an integral part of the Technology \\& Operations team at Allied Container Group. This role involves designing, developing, and maintaining cutting\\-edge web applications and services that support the company's operational and business objectives. The successful candidate will work closely with cross\\-functional teams, including UI/UX designers, operations staff, and management, to deliver reliable and scalable solutions. The position offers an exciting opportunity to contribute to innovative projects, utilizing modern full\\-stack development frameworks such as React and Laravel, and exploring emerging technologies like artificial intelligence and automation. The role requires a proactive approach, problem\\-solving skills, and the ability to adapt to a dynamic working environment, including potential relocation to the Middle East after a probation period.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Candidates should possess a minimum of two years of hands\\-on full\\-stack development experience, particularly with frameworks like React, Laravel, and React Native, along with proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, and related mobile frameworks. Experience with databases and version control tools such as Git or SVN is essential, as is familiarity with web servers like Apache or Nginx. A bachelor's degree in Computer Science or an equivalent field is preferred, though relevant work experience will also be considered. Fundamental understanding of software development lifecycle practices, UI/UX principles, and CI/CD pipelines is required. Knowledge of cloud services such as AWS, Azure, or DigitalOcean, along with system testing and automated testing, will be advantageous. Familiarity with OCR frameworks, system integration, and automation technologies is highly desirable. The ideal candidate should demonstrate strong problem\\-solving abilities, initiative, and excellent communication skills, with an interest in exploring AI and automation solutions.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Develop, automate, and maintain web applications and services aligned with business and operational goals, ensuring high performance and adherence to quality standards.
* Collaborate with team leads and members to gather requirements, define project scope, and ensure timely delivery of solutions.
* Work closely with UI/UX teams to ensure design consistency and optimal user experience across applications.
* Document technical specifications, project progress, and product features for future reference and knowledge sharing.
* Stay informed about emerging trends, tools, and technologies in web development to continuously enhance skills and improve project outcomes.
* Engage with operational teams, including yard staff, logistics, and accounts, to understand workflows and tailor solutions accordingly.
* Participate in system testing, troubleshooting, and resolving issues independently, ensuring seamless deployment and operation of applications.
* Support automation initiatives and contribute to research on AI applications relevant to logistics and supply chain management.


**Benefits**
 Allied Container Group offers a competitive compensation package, including health insurance, paid leave, and opportunities for professional growth. Employees gain exposure to innovative technologies and work in a dynamic environment that fosters continuous learning. The company promotes a collaborative culture, encouraging team members to contribute ideas and develop their skills further. Additionally, successful candidates may have opportunities for relocation to strategic locations such as Dubai or Oman after the initial probation period, providing valuable international experience. The organization values work\\-life balance and offers a supportive environment conducive to career development and personal growth.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Allied Container Group is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that a diverse workforce enhances innovation and drives our success, and we welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds who meet the qualifications and are eager to contribute to our mission.

title: Staff Software Engineer, Risk
description:
**About The Team**
 The Risk Platform team builds scalable platform solutions to tackle the challenging problem of fraud \\& abuse across the entire Uber Product space.
   

  

 The team has built state\\-of\\-the\\-art systems for Feature Engineering and Knowledge Graph of business entities to power features for all risk rules and machine learning models. The platforms are built for more broader use and support key use cases across Risk, Safety, Identity, Payments and Compliance teams!
   

  

 As an engineer on this team, you will work with a talented and highly collaborative cross functional team of Engineers (backend and machine learning engineers), Risk Analysts, Data Analysts, Data Scientists, and Product. We're nimble and efficient, and we like to have fun!
   

  

 The Risk Platform team builds and scales high throughput low latency systems for access of knowledge graph features and vector features.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Designing and developing backend systems infrastructure leveraging Cassandra, Hadoop/Hive, Flink and other Uber internal infrastructure platforms.

* Designing and developing spec driven feature computations for rules and ML models.
* Work closely with a fun and highly collaborative cross\\-functional team of Engineers, Product Managers, Data Scientists, Data Analysts and Risk Analysts

title: Remote Data Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Based in San Francisco, California, Turing is the world’s leading research accelerator for frontier AI labs and a trusted partner for global enterprises deploying advanced AI systems. Turing supports its clients by accelerating frontier research through high\\-quality data, sophisticated training pipelines, and a team of top AI researchers specializing in coding, reasoning, STEM, multilinguality, multimodality, and agents. Beyond research, Turing helps enterprises transform AI from proof of concept into proprietary intelligence by developing reliable systems that deliver measurable impact, enhance operational efficiency, and generate lasting results on the P\\&L. Committed to innovation and excellence, Turing is at the forefront of AI advancements, empowering organizations to harness the full potential of artificial intelligence across diverse industries.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking experienced Software Engineers (SWE Bench – Data Engineer / Data Science) to join our team and contribute to benchmark\\-driven evaluation projects focused on real\\-world data engineering and data science workflows. This role involves hands\\-on work with production\\-like datasets, designing and building data pipelines, performing data analysis, and supporting experiments to evaluate and enhance the performance of advanced AI systems. The ideal candidate will have a strong foundation in data engineering and data science, with the ability to work across various stages of data preparation, analysis, and modeling within complex codebases. You will collaborate closely with researchers and engineers to develop challenging, real\\-world data workflows, ensuring the robustness and reproducibility of benchmarking processes. This position offers an exciting opportunity to work on cutting\\-edge AI evaluation projects in a dynamic, innovative environment.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Minimum of 3\\+ years of professional experience as a Data Engineer, Data Scientist, or Software Engineer with a focus on data workflows.
* Proficiency in Python for data engineering and data science tasks, including data processing, analysis, and modeling.
* Hands\\-on experience working with structured and unstructured datasets.
* Strong understanding of machine learning principles and data science fundamentals.
* Ability to navigate and modify complex, real\\-world codebases effectively.
* Proven experience in writing clean, maintainable, and well\\-documented code.
* Excellent problem\\-solving skills, especially related to data\\-intensive and algorithmic challenges.
* Strong communication skills, both spoken and written, in English.


**Responsibilities**
* Work with structured and unstructured datasets to support evaluation tasks aligned with SWE Bench standards.
* Design, develop, and validate data pipelines used in benchmarking and evaluation workflows.
* Perform data processing, feature extraction, and validation for data science applications.
* Write, run, and modify Python scripts to process data and support experimental workflows locally.
* Assess data quality, transformations, and outputs to ensure accuracy, correctness, and reproducibility.
* Create clean, well\\-documented, and reusable data workflows suitable for benchmarking purposes.
* Participate in code reviews to maintain high standards of code quality, readability, and maintainability.
* Collaborate with research teams and engineering colleagues to design realistic, challenging data engineering and data science tasks for AI evaluation.


**Benefits**
 Joining Turing as a freelance Software Engineer offers the flexibility of working remotely from anywhere in the world, enabling a healthy work\\-life balance. You will have the opportunity to work on cutting\\-edge AI projects with leading LLM companies, gaining exposure to innovative technologies and methodologies. Turing provides a supportive environment that fosters professional growth and continuous learning. Additionally, freelancers can enjoy competitive compensation, flexible scheduling, and the chance to be part of a global community of talented AI professionals. This role is ideal for individuals seeking challenging projects, the freedom to work remotely, and the opportunity to contribute to transformative AI solutions.

title: Accessibility Developer 3
description:
**Overview**
* The Accessibility Developer 3 is responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining automated accessibility testing infrastructure and solutions. This role partners with the Software Accessibility Architect to create scalable CI/CD accessibility testing frameworks, develop accessibility test automation libraries, conduct complex accessibility assessments, and enable development teams to identify, prioritize, and resolve accessibility defects effectively.
* The Developer ensures timely delivery of high\\-quality software within the release timelines and guidelines. This role entails supporting the global product landscape and helping teams implement strategically focused automated solutions, tools, technologies and automation.


**Responsibilities**
**Accessibility Activities**
* Design and implement automated accessibility testing using Playwright and axe\\-core; build CI/CD pipelines that validate HTML semantic structure, ARIA implementation, keyboard navigation, and screen reader compatibility
* Develop custom JavaScript, Python, and Java\\-based accessibility test automation libraries to extend existing frameworks and address specialized compliance requirements
* Analyze automated accessibility scanning results and translate findings into actionable JIRA defects with specific WCAG 2\\.2 success criteria references, severity levels, and remediation recommendations
* Conduct manual accessibility assessments using Windows (NVDA, JAWS) and macOS (VoiceOver) screen readers to validate automated findings and identify complex accessibility issues
* Create accessibility dashboards and report mechanisms that track test execution, compliance status, and metrics; collaborate with teams to triage defects and validate fixes
* Provide technical coaching to development teams on ARIA patterns, semantic HTML, keyboard accessibility, and inclusive design, conduct accessibility training and code reviews
* Align accessibility testing with organizational frameworks and Design System best practices; support creation of accessible user stories with testable acceptance criteria


**Coding Requirements**
* Develop complex code based on functional specifications, complete logic and algorithm design in alignment with established standards
* Translate and analyze software requirements into design specifications and ensure adherence to requirements
* Perform complex peer code review and analysis; provide insight on broader impact of software changes
* Incorporate the business value and identify the broader impact to the software; influence and provide technical guidance to other team members
* Test code to verify it meets the technical specifications and is working as intended before submitting to code review
* Influence and lead on standards and processes of team and events including planning work estimation solution demos reviews and implementation design of code discussions
* Understand business application and coding tasks to make recommendations for internal process improvements and product documentation
* Research complex escalations for production issues or software code issues to ensure the stability of the application
* Implement development standards to ensure compliance with product and industry practices and regulations
* Mentor coach train and provide feedback to other team members; may provide feedback to leadership on technical abilities of team


**Soft Skills**
* Strong critical thinking and problem\\-solving skills
* Self\\-motivated with the ability to manage projects to completion with minimal oversight
* Ability to work independently and in a team environment
* Passionate competitive and intellectually curious
* Sharp fast learner with technology curiosity and aptitude
* Good ability to establish rapport and gain the trust of others; effective at gaining consensus
* Strong at using original thinking to translate goals into the implementation of new ideas and design solutions


**Preferred Qualifications**
**Basic Qualifications**
* Accessibility certifications (e.g., IAAP CPACC) or contributions to open\\-source accessibility projects
* Experience building custom accessibility testing frameworks or creating accessibility dashboards


**Technical Qualifications**
* 5\\+ years of relevant experience
* Significant experience in JavaScript; working knowledge of Python and/or Java for automation library development
* Strong understanding of HTML5 semantic structure, DOM hierarchy, and CSS; foundational SQL knowledge
* Strong knowledge and understanding of Design Systems such as: Angular Material, Carbon DS, React DS, Salesforce DS, among others
* Hands\\-on experience with Playwright for automated testing and axe\\-core or similar accessibility scanning tools
* Experience with CI/CD tools (Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions); familiarity with JIRA for defect tracking and dashboard creation


**Accessibility Knowledge**
* Solid working knowledge of WCAG 2\\.2 guidelines (Level A/AA); ability to map defects to specific success criteria
* Strong expertise in ARIA roles, properties, and states; understanding of accessible design patterns
* Proficiency with Windows (NVDA, JAWS) and macOS (VoiceOver) screen readers; ability to identify accessibility issues by interacting with assistive technology
* Understanding of keyboard navigation, focus management, color contrast, and other accessibility requirements


**Experience**
* Demonstrated experience building test automation frameworks or libraries; comfortable working in Windows/Linux development environments
* Experience working in agile teams; proven ability to conduct peer reviews and provide constructive feedback
* Experience building custom accessibility testing frameworks or creating accessibility dashboards


**Core Competencies**
* Excellent written and oral communication; ability to explain accessibility concepts to diverse audiences
* Strong analytical and critical thinking; detail\\-oriented with commitment to quality and accuracy
* Self\\-motivated and collaborative; passionate about accessibility and inclusive design
* Fast learner with intellectual curiosity; ability to quickly acquire knowledge of new tools and standards

title: Staff Software Development Engineer
description:
**About Zscaler**
 Zscaler accelerates digital transformation to ensure our customers can be more agile, efficient, resilient, and secure. As an
 **AI\\-forward enterprise** 
 , we are constantly pushing the envelope, leveraging the world’s largest security data lake to power our cloud\\-native Zero Trust Exchange platform. This innovation protects our customers from cyberattacks and data loss by securely connecting users, devices, and applications in any location.
   

  

 Here,
 **impact in your role matters more than title** 
 and trust is built on results. We say, impact over activity. We seek innovators who actively use AI to amplify their impact and who thrive in an environment where we leverage intelligent systems to stay ahead of evolving threats. We believe in transparency and value
 **constructive, honest debate** 
 —we’re focused on getting to the best ideas, faster. We build high\\-performing teams that can make an impact quickly and with high quality. To do this, we are building a culture of execution centered on
 **customer obsession** 
 , collaboration, ownership, and accountability.
   

  

 We value high\\-impact, high\\-accountability with a sense of urgency where you’re enabled to do your best work and embrace your potential. If you’re driven by purpose, thrive on solving complex challenges, and want to be part of the team that’s helping to secure the AI age, we invite you to bring your talents to Zscaler and help shape the future of cybersecurity.
   

  

**Role**
 We are looking for an experienced Staff Machine Learning Engineer to join our Engineering team. This role is based in Hyderabad, reporting to the Senior Director, Engineering. You will be responsible for building and maintaining large\\-scale distributed systems that power our entire ML pipeline, from data collection to real\\-time serving. You'll solve complex real\\-world business problems by partnering closely with data scientists and product teams to deliver impactful automation and intelligence.
   

  

**What You’ll Do (Role Expectations)**
* Build and maintain large\\-scale distributed systems to support the whole pipeline including data collection, feature engineering, model training, model evaluation, model deployment, and real\\-time serving
* Develop functional specifications, assess task requirements and scheduling, and participate in the development, debug, and support
* Solve complex real\\-world business problems like threat detection and business intelligence by working closely with stakeholders including data scientists, product management, and product engineering teams


**Who You Are (Success Profile)**
* You thrive in ambiguity. You're comfortable building the path as you walk it. You thrive in a dynamic environment, seeing ambiguity not as a hindrance, but as the raw material to build something meaningful.
* You act like an owner. Your passion for the mission fuels your bias for action. You operate with integrity because you genuinely care about the outcome. True ownership involves leveraging dynamic range: the ability to navigate seamlessly between high\\-level strategy and hands\\-on execution.
* You are a problem\\-solver. You love running towards the challenges because you are laser\\-focused on finding the solution, knowing that solving the hard problems delivers the biggest impact.
* You are a high\\-trust collaborator. You are ambitious for the team, not just yourself. You embrace our challenge culture by giving and receiving ongoing feedback—knowing that candor delivered with clarity and respect is the truest form of teamwork and the fastest way to earn trust.
* You are a learner. You have a true growth mindset and are obsessed with your own development, actively seeking feedback to become a better partner and a stronger teammate. You love what you do and you do it with purpose.


**What We’re Looking For (Minimum Qualifications)**
* 4\\+ years of experience as a Software Engineer or ML Engineer
* Experience with applying machine learning for improving key business metrics, optimized models for accuracy, latency
* Experience with researching newer techniques, and innovating for building ML based solutions
* Experience with algorithms in building out data collection/processing infrastructure, Machine Learning model training, and serving platforms
* Deep expertise with cloud infrastructure (AWS)


**What Will Make You Stand Out (Preferred Qualifications)**
* Proven track record of designing, building and shipping end\\-end applications at scale
* Experience identifying and solving problems in data using machine learning systems
* Familiarity with multi\\-agent systems, agent architectures, prompt engineering and SOTA AI frameworks


 At Zscaler, we are committed to building a team that reflects the communities we serve and the customers we work with. We foster an inclusive environment that values all backgrounds and perspectives, emphasizing collaboration and belonging. Join us in our mission to make doing business seamless and secure.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Our Benefits program is one of the most important ways we support our employees. Zscaler proudly offers comprehensive and inclusive benefits to meet the diverse needs of our employees and their families throughout their life stages, including:
   

  

* Various health plans
* Time off plans for vacation and sick time

* In\\-office perks, and more!

title: Sr Eng, Software
description:
**This is where** 
 your work makes a difference.
   

  

 At Baxter, we believe every person—regardless of who they are or where they are from—deserves a chance to live a healthy life. It was our founding belief in 1931 and continues to be our guiding principle. We are redefining healthcare delivery to make a greater impact today, tomorrow, and beyond.
   

  

 Our Baxter colleagues are united by our Mission to Save and Sustain Lives. Together, our community is driven by a culture of courage, trust, and collaboration. Every individual is empowered to take ownership and make a meaningful impact. We strive for efficient and effective operations, and we hold each other accountable for delivering exceptional results.
   

  

 Here, you will find more than just a job—you will find purpose and pride. 
   

  

**Summary:**
 Apply a solid understanding of System Engineering practices and theories/practices in Risk Management toward the development of new or enhanced Software products or processes. Support the advancement of Risk and Reliability competencies and execution across the Device Systems Software Engineering organization.
   

  

**Essential Duties and Responsibilities:**
 We are looking for a highly skilled Software Engineer who is comfortable with both front and back end programming. Full stack developers are responsible for developing and designing front end web architecture, ensuring the responsiveness of applications, and collaborating with UI/UX team.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* B.E./B.Tech. in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Software Engineering or related field and 5\\-9 years related experience.
* Experience with C\\#, .NET Core – API Development, Performance improvement.
* Knowledge of front\\-end technologies including VueJS, CSS3, JavaScript, and HTML5
* Understanding of object\\-oriented programming.
* Experience with Docker , Helm Charts, Container , Cloud Computing
* Strong in PostgreSQL Database performance analysis and SQL/ pgSQL performance tuning
* Good to have MongoDB, Redis Cache, Devops knowledge
* Good to have Unix Scripting knowledge, MQTT, Keycloak
* A solid technical understanding of the principles and procedures of software engineering (e.g., SDLC, IEC 62304, CMMI, Agile)
* Experience with software application architecture design and optimization
* Be passionate about software quality and be prepared to advocate on behalf of good processes and best practices.
* Ability to discuss normally encountered technical or project management issues, both verbally and in written form
* Experience with medical device or other regulated software engineering disciplines (e.g., software development environments, configuration management tools, code inspection techniques and tools, testing methods and test management tools).


**Equal Employment Opportunity**
 Baxter is an equal opportunity employer. Baxter evaluates qualified applicants without regard to race, color, religion, gender, national origin, age, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, protected veteran status, disability/handicap status or any other legally protected characteristic.
   

  

**Reasonable Accommodations**
 Baxter is committed to working with and providing reasonable accommodations to individuals with disabilities globally. If, because of a medical condition or disability, you need a reasonable accommodation for any part of the application or interview process, please click on the link here and let us know the nature of your request along with your contact information.
   

  

**Recruitment Fraud Notice**

 Baxter has discovered incidents of employment scams, where fraudulent parties pose as Baxter employees, recruiters, or other agents, and engage with online job seekers in an attempt to steal personal and/or financial information. To learn how you can protect yourself, review our Recruitment Fraud Notice.

**About This Role**
 We at LIXIL are seeking a skilled and experienced

 You will collaborate closely with our global cross\\-functional team, including UX/UI designers, further experts, internal / external developers, and content managers, to deliver cutting\\-edge web applications that provide seamless user experiences.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**

**Required Qualification**

* Track record of working on SSR (Service\\-Side\\-Rendering) / SSG (Static\\-Site\\-Generation) applications

**Additional Skills**

**Good To Have Expertise**

* Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively within cross\\-functional teams.
